title: WOOF CLASSIC T-SHIRT
description: High-quality, ultra-soft combed cotton tee featuring the iconic WEAREDOGS minimalist logo. Pre-shrunk, athletic fit, designed for everyday comfort.

title: CYBERPUNK SHIBA HOODIE
description: Mid-weight, premium fleece hoodie featuring neon Japanese-style Shiba Inu prints. Standard fit, cozy brushed interior with double-lined hood.

title: RETRO DAD HAT
description: Adjustable low-profile baseball cap with embroidered dog motif. 100% cotton chino twill, washed finish for a vintage feel.

title: LIMITED EDITION GOLDEN SOCKS
description: Premium athletic socks with woven golden retriever designs. Fully cushioned footbed and arch support.
